Gazipur, Gazipur (Gazipur Sadar, Sreepur) Salary: Negotiable Published: 06 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age At least 28 years Excellent written and verbal communication skills—especially for email correspondence with internal teams and Merchandisers. Excellent team leadership and management capability. Good computer literacy, including Email, MS Excel, Google Sheets, and reporting tools. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines. Responsibilities & Context Job Context: We are looking for a dynamic and experienced professional to lead Knit Garments Dyeing & Washing R&D activities. The candidate will be responsible for developing innovative washing and dyeing techniques, ensuring quality bulk production, and aligning R&D with fashion trends and customer requirements. Job Responsibilities: Develop and implement new innovations in garments washing and dyeing processes. Research and develop washing techniques suitable for different fiber compositions and fabric structures. Ensure timely development of all washing samples within the TNA (Time & Action Plan). Monitor and execute first bulk production to ensure smooth quality, shade matching, and process standardization. Conduct fashion trend analysis and translate trends into effective washing techniques and product developments. Experience At least 3 years The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): NGO Responsibilities & Context HELVETAS Swiss Intercooperation is a development organization anchored in Switzerland. Our vision is a just world in which all men and women determine the course of their lives in dignity and security, sustainably using environmental resources. The promotion of good governance and gender equality, and social equity is an integral part of the overall organizational policy of HELVETAS Swiss Intercooperation, through which we seek to ensure that our organizational culture and practice reflect our commitment to social change. The Finance and Administration Officer (F&AO) play a key operational role in ensuring smooth financial management and administrative support for the ENABLE project at the field level.
